SEARCH
Package discount

Class Discount

java.lang.Object
discount.Discount
Direct Known Subclasses:
CategoryDiscount, PackDiscount, ProductDiscount
public abstract class Discount extends Object
It implements the general discount
Version:
1.5
Author:
Ana O.R.
See Also:
  • Store
  • StoreProduct
  • Pack
  • Category

  • Field Details

    • totalId

      public static int totalId
      The global variable to determine which id should a new product have

    • type

      public final DiscountType type
      The discount's type

    • coverage

      public final DiscountCoverage coverage
      The discount's coverage

  • Constructor Details

    • Discount

      public Discount(String assignedId, DiscountType assignedType, DiscountCoverage assignedCoverage, LocalDateTime assignedStartDate, LocalDateTime assignedEndDate) throws IllegalArgumentException
      Instantiates a new Discount with a certain id
      Parameters:
      assignedId - the discount's id
      assignedType - the discount's type
      assignedCoverage - the coverage
      assignedStartDate - the discount's start date
      assignedEndDate - the discount's end date
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - the dates weren't valid

    • Discount

      public Discount(DiscountType assignedType, DiscountCoverage assignedCoverage, LocalDateTime assignedStartDate, LocalDateTime assignedEndDate) throws IllegalArgumentException
      Instantiates a new Discount
      Parameters:
      assignedType - the discount's type
      assignedCoverage - the coverage
      assignedStartDate - the discount's start date
      assignedEndDate - the discount's end date
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - the dates weren't valid

  • Method Details

    • getTotalId

      public static int getTotalId()
      It gets the discount's total id
      Returns:
      the discount's total id

    • setTotalId

      public static void setTotalId(int newTotalId)
      It sets the discount's total id.
      Parameters:
      newTotalId - the discount's new total id

    • conflictingDisc

      public boolean conflictingDisc(List<StoreProduct> testedProducts)
      It checks whether the desired discount can be added to the store without interfering with another
      Parameters:
      testedProducts - the discount to be tested's products
      Returns:
      true if it is conflicting, false otherwise

    • conflictingDisc

      public boolean conflictingDisc(boolean overWholeStore) throws IllegalArgumentException
      It checks whether the desired discount can be added to the store without interfering with another
      Parameters:
      overWholeStore - whether the discount to be tested applies over the whole store, must be true
      Returns:
      true if it is conflicting, false otherwise
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - overWholeStore must be true

    • checkExpiration

      public void checkExpiration()
      It checks if the discount is no longer active

    • getCoverage

      public DiscountCoverage getCoverage()
      It gets the discount's coverage type
      Returns:
      the discount's coverage type

    • getDisabled

      public boolean getDisabled()
      Is gets whether the discount has expired
      Returns:
      true if it is disabled, false otherwise

    • setDisabled

      public void setDisabled(boolean newDisabled)
      It sets whether the discount has expired or not
      Parameters:
      newDisabled - true if it is disabled, false otherwise

    • getEndDate

      public LocalDateTime getEndDate()
      It gets the discount's end date
      Returns:
      the discount's end date

    • setEndDate

      public void setEndDate(LocalDateTime newEndDate) throws IllegalArgumentException
      It allows the manager to change a discount's end date
      Parameters:
      newEndDate - the discount's new end date
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - the start date is after the end date

    • getId

      public String getId()
      It gets the discount's id
      Returns:
      the discount's id

    • getPrintInfo

      public abstract String getPrintInfo()
      It returns the discount's basic info
      Returns:
      the discount's basic info

    • getProducts

      public abstract List<StoreProduct> getProducts()
      It gets the store products affected by this discount
      Returns:
      the store products affected by this discount

    • getStartDate

      public LocalDateTime getStartDate()
      It gets the discount's start date
      Returns:
      the discount's start date

    • setStartDate

      public void setStartDate(LocalDateTime newStartDate) throws IllegalArgumentException
      It allows the manager to change a discount's start date
      Parameters:
      newStartDate - the discount's new start date
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - the start date is after the end date

    • getType

      public DiscountType getType()
      It gets the discount's discount type
      Returns:
      the discount's discount type
